overall.description: Gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character with a large cargo backpack traversing a desolate volcanic landscape during a heavy rainstorm. The character walks steadily across rocky terrain toward misty mountains in the background, with a brief appearance of a blue holographic guidance path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open volcanic plain with scattered rocks

events.description: blue holographic guidance path appears on the ground showing the route forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the reddish volcanic plain toward the distant mountains while carrying a large cargo backpack with glowing blue lights

entered.detail: misty mountain peaks forming the backdrop of the landscape
dark reddish-brown volcanic soil and rock covering the ground
large dark rocks scattered across the terrain
glowing blue line on the ground indicating the walking path

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an open volcanic plain with reddish-brown soil and scattered dark rocks. Heavy rain falls continuously as the character moves toward a misty mountain range in the distance. A blue holographic guidance path briefly appears on the ground to show the way forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet volcanic rock field with patches of grass

agents.ego_description: continuing through darker, wetter volcanic terrain with small puddles forming on the ground, navigating around rock formations

entered.detail: small pools of water forming on the dark volcanic ground from the rain
patches of brown grass beginning to appear on the sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to darker, wet volcanic rock with small puddles reflecting the grey sky. Sparse patches of brown grass begin appearing on the sides of the path while the blue guidance path fades away. The character maintains a steady pace through the increasingly rugged landscape.

agents.ego_description: navigating through terrain with denser vegetation and larger rock formations on both sides, approaching the mountain base

entered.detail: denser vegetation with tall grass and small bushes lining the path
prominent volcanic rock formations flanking the trail

segments.scene_description: The landscape becomes more vegetated with tall grass patches and bushes lining the path. Large volcanic rock outcrops flank both sides of the trail. The mountains appear closer and more detailed through the rain as the character continues the journey across the mixed grass and rock terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate volcanic plain that gradually transforms into a more rugged, vegetated highland. It begins with the character traversing reddish-brown soil and scattered dark rocks under heavy rain, guided briefly by a blue holographic path flickering on the ground. As the character advances, the terrain shifts toward darker, wet volcanic rock filled with reflective puddles while the guidance path fades and sparse patches of brown grass emerge. The scene then expands into a more lush environment where tall grass and bushes line the trail, flanked by large volcanic rock outcrops. Finally, the distant mountains become more detailed and imposing through the rain as the character continues their steady journey across the mixed terrain.
